tile with data fabric logic, it's main clock is FCLK

tile with memory controller, its main clock is UMC_MCLK
tile with level shifter that connect two power domain.
tile with USB controller or PHY.
tile with clock PLL macro and related logic, its main clock is SOCCLK

tile with North Bridge Input/Output. AMD sub-system design hierarchy that assembles a collection of NBIO function blocks to build a high performance PCIe compatible I/O interconnect for SOC, its main clock is NBIO_LCLK
tile with SDMAs,Host Data Path (HDP), Interrupt Handler (IH),Lite-SDMA (LSDMA), its main clock is SOCCLK
tile with Multimedia Hub, its main clock is SOCCLK
tile with Address Translation HUB,its main clock is SOCCLK
tile with cdc buffer that connect two clock domain.
tile with GPIO macro.
tile with dft logic.
tile with Distributed IO Crossbar comprised of a collection of components that layer on top of a set of shared and/or dedicated SERDES IO, its main clock is NBIO_LCLK.
tile with different SMU microprocessors integrated into the design. MP0 aka PSP and later, MPASP,its main clock is SOCCLK.
tiles provides two sub-systems, Display Controller Engine Subsystem and DPCS Subsystem (DPCSSYS). Its main clock is DCN_DISPCLK.
